title: Schedules
scope: The platform's recurrence engine: defines recurring events backing chores, maintenance, medical, etc., supporting RRULE, cron-style, friendly (daily/weekly/monthly/yearly/interval), and usage-based (every N miles) recurrence. Owns 'next due' computation and a completion log. NOT one-shot reminders (the Reminders app) or job execution (the Jobs app) — Schedules answers 'when is it next due?'.

specs.title: Define a schedule
specs.behavior: Defining a schedule records a recurring event with a recurrence rule (RRULE, cron, friendly, or usage-based) and an owning entity.

specs.title: Compute next due
specs.behavior: The engine computes a schedule's next due occurrence from its recurrence rule and last completion.

specs.title: Log a completion
specs.behavior: Completing a schedule occurrence records it in the completion log and advances the next-due date.
